benefits.description: Nice energy boost at 8mg daily dose

side_effects.description: Systemic fatigue hit at 5mg; felt tired for a few days after backing down to 4mg

protocol_notes: Started at 5mg (experienced systemic fatigue); backed down to 4mg (tired for a few days); titrated up to 10mg; found optimal dose at 8mg; references human trials that started at 10mg and titrated to 50mg over one year with amazing results; believes low dose protocols are promoted only because of affordability, not efficacy; notes evidence suggests doses below 8mg have no effect for him; currently on 8mg daily and would prefer to explore 15-20mg but cost prohibitive; believes repair process requires daily dosing and pushing through fatigue phases which are short-lived
